releaseNotes: v0.24.13 — Three sync fixes prompted by Alex's report. (1) Durable outbound queue: every scan / pull / edit is persisted to disk at the moment it's recorded and the sync runner drains the queue on every sync attempt; if the network or sync state is broken when an op happens, the row stays put for retry instead of vanishing. (2) Manual Sync now surfaces real errors with a red banner instead of always showing a green Sync complete. (3) Setup screen: button labels and order updated so Join existing pharmacy is the primary action, and Create new pharmacy now requires explicit confirmation to prevent the duplicate-pharmacy bug.
